scripts.zip: bun run build && bun run zip:clean
scripts.create-zip: mkdir -p ../lime-product-labels-temp && rsync -a --exclude-from='.distignore' ./ ../lime-product-labels-temp/lime-product-labels && cd ../lime-product-labels-temp && zip -r ../lime-product-labels/lime-product-labels-v$npm_package_version.zip lime-product-labels ; cd ../lime-product-labels && rm -rf ../lime-product-labels-temp
